'''âw-dh-p''' ('''kawadhap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neg|neg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neg|neg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-dh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kawadhap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadhap|thiwadhap]] || [[word:jiwadhap|jiwadhap]] || [[word:shiwadhap|shiwadhap]] || [[word:kiwadhap|kiwadhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadhap|thuthuwadhap]] || [[word:jujuwadhap|jujuwadhap]] || [[word:shushuwadhap|shushuwadhap]] || [[word:kukuwadhap|kukuwadhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwadhap|thuwadhap]] || [[word:juwadhap|juwadhap]] || [[word:shuwadhap|shuwadhap]] || [[word:kuwadhap|kuwadhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwadhap|thuwadhap]] || [[word:juwadhap|juwadhap]] || [[word:shuwadhap|shuwadhap]] || [[word:kuwadhap|kuwadhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewadhap|thewadhap]] || [[word:jewadhap|jewadhap]] || [[word:shewadhap|shewadhap]] || [[word:kewadhap|kewadhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowadhap|thothowadhap]] || [[word:jojowadhap|jojowadhap]] || [[word:shoshowadhap|shoshowadhap]] || [[word:kokowadhap|kokowadhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadhap|thowadhap]] || [[word:jowadhap|jowadhap]] || [[word:showadhap|showadhap]] || [[word:kowadhap|kowadhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadhap|thowadhap]] || [[word:jowadhap|jowadhap]] || [[word:showadhap|showadhap]] || [[word:kowadhap|kowadhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwadhap|thĂŠwadhap]] || [[word:jĂŠwadhap|jĂŠwadhap]] || [[word:shĂŠwadhap|shĂŠwadhap]] || [[word:kĂŠwadhap|kĂŠwadhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawadhap|thathawadhap]] || [[word:jajawadhap|jajawadhap]] || [[word:shashawadhap|shashawadhap]] || [[word:kakawadhap|kakawadhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawadhap|thawadhap]] || [[word:jawadhap|jawadhap]] || [[word:shawadhap|shawadhap]] || [[word:kawadhap|kawadhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawadhap|thawadhap]] || [[word:jawadhap|jawadhap]] || [[word:shawadhap|shawadhap]] || [[word:kawadhap|kawadhap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawadhap|shawadhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawadhap|goshawadhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawadhap|gokishawadhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawadhapnĂŒ|shawadhapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhapnknĂŒ|goshawadhapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhapnĂŒ|gokishawadhapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawadhapshĂ«|shawadhapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkshĂ«|goshawadhapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawadhapshĂ«|gokishawadhapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhapro|shawadhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkro|goshawadhapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhapro|gokishawadhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhapmu|shawadhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkmu|goshawadhapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhapmu|gokishawadhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawadhapsher|shawadhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawadhapnksher|goshawadhapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawadhapsher|gokishawadhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawadhapng|shawadhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkng|goshawadhapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawadhapng|gokishawadhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawadhapya|shawadhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkya|goshawadhapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawadhapya|gokishawadhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawadhapyam|shawadhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkyam|goshawadhapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawadhapyam|gokishawadhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhapnĂŒshĂ«|shawadhapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawadhapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawadhapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhapnĂŒro|shawadhapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhapnknĂŒro|goshawadhapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhapnĂŒro|gokishawadhapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhapnĂŒmu|shawadhapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhapnknĂŒmu|goshawadhapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhapnĂŒmu|gokishawadhapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhapshĂ«nĂŒ|shawadhapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawadhapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawadhapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhapshĂ«ro|shawadhapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkshĂ«ro|goshawadhapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhapshĂ«ro|gokishawadhapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhapshĂ«mu|shawadhapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkshĂ«mu|goshawadhapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhapshĂ«mu|gokishawadhapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhapronĂŒ|shawadhapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkronĂŒ|goshawadhapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhapronĂŒ|gokishawadhapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhaproshĂ«|shawadhaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkroshĂ«|goshawadhapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhaproshĂ«|gokishawadhaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawadhapromu|shawadhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkromu|goshawadhapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawadhapromu|gokishawadhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawadhapmunĂŒ|shawadhapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkmunĂŒ|goshawadhapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawadhapmunĂŒ|gokishawadhapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawadhapmushĂ«|shawadhapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkmushĂ«|goshawadhapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawadhapmushĂ«|gokishawadhapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawadhapmuro|shawadhapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawadhapnkmuro|goshawadhapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawadhapmuro|gokishawadhapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
